title: Cloud Migration & Scaling Decision Flow for Capacity Planning
description: A flowchart illustrating the decision-making process for migrating workloads to the cloud and scaling resources based on demand.
relationships: Analyze workload requirements from On-Premises to determine cloud fit
Select a Cloud Provider and service model (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS) based on analysis
Continuously monitor performance metrics to trigger Auto-Scaling Policies
Review scaling actions and resource usage via the Cost Management Dashboard for optimization
